title: Jurassic Reborn Natural Spawning Addon
description: This addon allows for Jurassic Reborn creatures to spawn in your overworld!
body:
Jurassic Reborn Natural Spawning is a premium-style addon for Jurassic Reborn that redefines the player experience by introducing extinct creatures into the Overworld through natural spawning. This feature-driven expansion increases immersion, strengthens world-building, and creates a more interactive gameplay environment. By merging prehistoric wildlife with standard exploration, the addon delivers a unique value proposition for players seeking a richer, more expansive Jurassic Reborn experience.

 

**_NATURAL SPAWNING CONFIG MUST BE TURNED TO TRUE IN MAIN MOD FOR WORLD GENERATION!_**
